title: KnollVision
content:
{{Top|real}}
'''KnollVision''' was a feature on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club website. It contained fifty-one three-dimensional [[:Wikipedia:QuickTime VR|QuickTime VR]] panoramic photos compiled by Visual Effects Supervisor [[John Knoll]] during the production of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].
